name: GLM-4.6: Advanced Agentic, Reasoning and Coding Capabilities - Z.ai
snippet:
Longer context window: The context window has been expanded from 128K to 200K tokens, enabling the model to handle more complex agentic tasks.
GLM-4.6: Advanced Agentic, Reasoning and Coding Capabilities Today, we are releasing the latest version of our flagship model: GLM-4.6. Compared with GLM-4.5, this generation brings several key improvements: Longer context window: The context window has been expanded from 128K to 200K tokens, enabling the model to handle more complex agentic tasks.
